final:
// // This module calculates the sum of A1 and A2 when B1 and C1 are not both high
module top_module(
    input A1,
    input A2,
    input B1,
    input C1,
    output reg [1:0] Y
);always @(*) begin
    if (B1 == 1 && C1 == 0) begin
        Y = A1 - A2;
    end else if (B1 == 1 && C1 == 1) begin
        Y = A1 * A2;
    end else begin
        Y = A1 + A2;
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module calculates the sum of A1 and A2 when B1 and C1 are not both high
